hook_text: If you do 100 hip flexor raises every morning on an empty stomach, say goodbye to belly fat. Add 100 opposite knee lifts and you'll melt stubborn love handles.
full_transcript_excerpt: If you do 100 hip flexor raises every morning on an empty stomach, say goodbye to belly fat. Add 100 opposite knee lifts and you'll melt stubborn love handles. Throw in 100 knee lifts with downward presses and you'll tighten your abs. Finish with 100 body weightight squats and your body will keep burning fat even after you stop
